originalTitle: Oil Tumbles, Stock Futures Rise Amid Hopes for Iran Deal
summary: Stock futures were rising late Sunday, and oil futures fell after the Trump administration hinted officials are inching closer to a deal with Iran to end the three-month conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Just after 6 p.m. Eastern time, Dow Jones Industrial Average futures were up 0.5% or 235 points. WTI futures and Brent crude futures were both down about 4%, to $92 a barrel and $96 a barrel, respectively.
content: Stock futures were rising late Sunday, and oil futures fell after the Trump administration hinted officials are inching closer to a deal with Iran to end the three-month conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Just after 6 p.m. Eastern time, Dow Jones Industrial Average futures were up 0.5% or 235 points. WTI futures and Brent crude futures were both down about 4%, to $92 a barrel and $96 a barrel, respectively.
chineseTitle: 伊朗协议有望达成，油价暴跌，股指期货上涨
chineseSummary: 周日晚间，股票期货上涨，在特朗普政府暗示官员们正在逐步接近与伊朗达成协议以结束三个月的冲突并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后，石油期货下跌。下午 6 点刚过。东部时间，道琼斯工业平均指数期货上涨 0.5%，即 235 点。 WTI 期货和布伦特原油期货均下跌约 4%，分别至每桶 92 美元和 96 美元。
chineseContent: 周日晚间，股票期货上涨，在特朗普政府暗示官员们正在逐步接近与伊朗达成协议以结束三个月的冲突并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后，石油期货下跌。下午 6 点刚过。东部时间，道琼斯工业平均指数期货上涨 0.5%，即 235 点。 WTI 期货和布伦特原油期货均下跌约 4%，分别至每桶 92 美元和 96 美元。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
